name: TizWildin-Aurora

name: TizWildin-Skyline
description: 30 BPM-tagged synthwave and darkwave loops with generator snapshot and dark neon additions.

name: TizWildin-Chroma
description: Multi-segment game synthwave loop sample pack from TizWildin Entertainment.

name: TizWildin-Chime
description: Multi-part 88 BPM chime collection spanning glass, void, halo, reed, and neon synthwave lanes.

name: Free Violin Synth Sample Kit
description: Physical-model violin sample kit rendered from the Instrudio violin instrument.

name: Free Dark Piano Sound Kit
description: 88 piano notes A0–C8 plus dark/cinematic loops and MIDI.

name: Free 808 Producer Kit
description: 94 hand-crafted 808 bass samples tuned to every chromatic key.

name: Free Riser Producer Kit

name: Phonk Producer Toolkit
description: Drift phonk starter kit with 808s, cowbells, drums, MIDI, textures, templates, GamePhonk, and Drift V3 expansions.

name: Free Future Bass Producer Kit
